overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment during golden hour. The player moves along a city street with modern architecture, passes through a dark concrete underpass tunnel, and emerges into an overgrown urban plaza with abandoned gravel paths and towering buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with traffic barricades approaching underpass

events.description: slight turn to the right as the path curves toward the tunnel entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the asphalt road toward a tunnel entrance, passing red and white concrete barricades on the left

notable_agents.action: person walking along the sidewalk in the opposite direction
group of people gathered near the tunnel entrance

entered.detail: large red and white striped concrete barriers blocking part of the road
open-air concrete parking structure with multiple levels and palm trees on top
modern building with distinctive orange trim along the roofline and overhangs
tall triangular-shaped building with reflective glass facade in the distance
dark opening of a concrete underpass tunnel at the end of the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit urban street during golden hour, with the camera moving forward past red and white barricades. A multi-level parking garage dominates the left side while an orange-trimmed building sits on the right. The camera approaches a dark tunnel entrance ahead, with a few pedestrians visible walking along the sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete underpass tunnel with overhead lighting

events.description: entering the dark concrete tunnel from the sunlit street, lighting changes dramatically
approaching the tunnel exit with bright golden hour sunlight becoming visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit tunnel toward the bright exit ahead, maintaining a steady pace

notable_agents.action: person walking along the right tunnel wall toward the exit

entered.detail: smooth gray concrete walls of the underpass with green painted lower sections
dim artificial lights mounted on the tunnel ceiling providing minimal illumination
bright sunlight visible at the far end of the tunnel creating a silhouette effect

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dark concrete tunnel, transitioning from bright sunlight to dim artificial lighting. The smooth concrete walls enclose the space as the camera moves toward a bright exit visible in the distance. A pedestrian walks along the right wall, and the tunnel floor shows wet patches reflecting the overhead lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown urban plaza with abandoned gravel paths between modern buildings

events.description: exiting the tunnel into an open overgrown plaza with tall palm trees and modern architecture
turning left to follow a gravel path through dense vegetation between buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through the overgrown plaza, turning onto a gravel path surrounded by tall grass and weeds, heading toward a pedestrian bridge

notable_agents.action: person in a yellow jacket walking across the overgrown plaza

entered.detail: tall wild grass and weeds covering the ground where pavement once was
narrow dirt and gravel trail cutting through the overgrown vegetation
large circular building with white horizontal stripes and glass facade
elevated glass and metal walkway connecting two buildings overhead
tall dark-colored building with illuminated signage reading 'NIGHT CITY'

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the scene opens into a sunlit urban plaza reclaimed by nature, with tall grass and weeds covering the ground. The camera turns onto a gravel path passing beneath a glass pedestrian bridge, with a large modern stadium visible ahead and a dark skyscraper rising on the right. A pedestrian in a yellow jacket crosses the overgrown area as the camera continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit city street through a dark underpass and into an overgrown urban plaza. It begins by moving past red and white barricades along a golden-hour street, flanked by a multi-level parking garage and an orange-trimmed building. As the camera approaches the horizon, the bright daylight vanishes upon entering a dim concrete tunnel where wet patches on the floor reflect artificial overhead lighting. The scene then opens back into the sunlight as the camera exits the tunnel, transitioning into a reclaimed plaza where tall grass and weeds cover the ground. Finally, the view shifts onto a gravel path passing beneath a glass pedestrian bridge, moving toward a large modern stadium and a towering dark skyscraper.
